description: A standard RoombaCore patrol unit. Circular, relentless, makes a sound that fills cats with primal dread.
flavorText: It hums menacingly. You feel an ancestral terror.

description: A street cat gone corporate. Wields a military-grade laser pointer. Moves unpredictably.
A sewer rat the size of a small dog, mutated by RoombaCore chemical waste. Surprisingly philosophical about its condition.
A premium RoombaCore model with a self-destruct function and surprisingly good WiFi.
An ancient evil that predates RoombaCore. The original Vacuum. Cats have feared it across generations. Boss encounter.
The final boss. A Roomba wearing a tiny business suit. Surprisingly articulate. Has a monologue.
